name: zero.xyz
description: Gives AI agents a search engine and payment layer for ~29,000 tools and services — agents discover the best service per task, call it, and pay per use from one wallet. No API keys to manage.

skills.name: Service Discovery
skills.description: Searches ~29,000 tools and services and picks the best match for the task using community ratings and fit.

skills.name: Pay-Per-Call Wallet
skills.description: Pays for tool calls per use from a single wallet, with costs ranging from free to about $0.50 per call.

skills.name: Zero-Config Tool Access
skills.description: Lets agents use new tools straight from the prompt with no API keys, accounts, or manual configuration.
